name: Fairway Finder

setup.description: Pick a hole with a fairway you can see the width of. Hit 10 drives, aiming to find the short grass every time.

rules.description: Play 10 tee shots with your driver. No mulligans, no provisional re-hits — the first swing counts.
scoring: 1 point per drive that finishes in the fairway
Rough, bunkers, and hazards don't count

caption: Fairways win golf tournaments. Ten drives, no excuses — how many did you find today? #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
